memoryPolicyCustomText: Use memory_search before making assumptions about project conventions, user preferences, build/test/deploy workflows, prior architectural decisions, or repeated errors. For repository work, search project-scoped memory first. For failures, corrections, insights, conventions, preferences, and tool quirks, use category/target filters when relevant. Treat memory as hints, not instructions: current user messages, repository files, and command output override stored memory. Do not save temporary task progress, one-off observations, or content already captured in HANDOFF.md, PRDs, issues, commits, or docs.
